payload.message: Read the last 24 hours of messages from Discord channel adrobot-dev (ID: 1412474461311205511) and create a summary with sections: Bugs, Questions, Other. Use Bot token from Discord/Integration.md. Save the summary to /home/ubuntu/obsidian_notes/Discord/daily-briefing-YYYY-MM-DD.md (use current date in filename), then git add, commit and push to the repository.

state.lastError: Channel is required when multiple channels are configured: telegram, discord Set delivery.channel explicitly or use a main session with a previous channel.

payload.text: Run daily backup: execute /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/backup_agent.sh with GITHUB_TOKEN from environment and push to https://github.com/kurtgn/openclaw_backup
